title: EUR_DATA: Integrating EU studies and Data Analytics using a Project-based Learning Approach
description: Open datasets, reproducible code, and educational resources on European political institutions, produced by the EUR_DATA Erasmus+ Jean Monnet Module (grant 101127178). The collection covers: (1) the formation of the 2024-2029 European Commission (the College of Commissioners, mission-letter commitments, confirmation hearings, the investiture vote, the 2025 Commission Work Programme, and a formation timeline); (2) euandi 2024 Voting Advice Application coding of Irish parties and candidates and of EU-level party families for the June 2024 European Parliament election (derived from the euandi 2024 dataset, European University Institute, CC BY 4.0); and (3) implementation tracking of the Commission's legislative agenda, resolved against the European Parliament Open Data API and EUR-Lex. Data is licensed CC BY 4.0 and the accompanying pipeline code Apache-2.0.
